Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2017 Vacated

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Allison Saunders of Ford & Harrison LLP telephone number 213-237-2400 appeared by telephone for Defendants Black Duck Software and Matt O'Meara.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Ms. Saunders stated that she filed a supplemental declaration and that Mr. Welsh has only been admitted Pro Hac Vice one time in the last two years. DEFENDANTS BLACK DUCK SOFTWARE, INC. and MATT O'MEARA'S MOTION TO ADMIT JOHN F. WELSH AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
